{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"HTMX focus management after delete (move focus to next item or add input)","description":"After deleting a todo via HTMX, focus should move to the logical next element:
- If remaining items exist, focus moves to the next todo item
- If deleted item was the last one, focus moves to the add-todo input
- Needs a JS event listener on htmx:afterSwap to manage focus

Driver: Carson Gross (HTMX expertise)
TDD: Write test, implement, verify green, commit+push, CI green, get 9/9 consensus.","assignedBy":"carson-gross","timestamp":"2026-02-08T22:30:41.453Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text:
That's a duplicate task assignment message for Task #3, which is already completed with 9/9 consensus. No action needed.
